title: Need to Know the Names of These Songs
display_title: Need to Know the Names of These Songs
wikitext:
[]: Need to Know the Names of These Songs             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Sat Oct 23, 2004 6:44 pm Can anyone tell me the name of that lame song that is played when Sandalphon "hatches" and starts attacking Asuka? Also I would like to know the name of the song that is played in episode six when Shinji opens the super-heated hatch of Rei's entry plug.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Sat Oct 23, 2004 9:31 pm In Death&Rebirth, the Shinji-saving-Rei scene had Namida (Tears) playing, but that's all I remember. Still one of my favourites.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sat Oct 23, 2004 10:39 pm Can anyone tell me the name of that lame song that is played when Sandalphon "hatches" and starts attacking Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Sun Oct 24, 2004 12:07 am Hexon.Arq wrote: Can anyone tell me the name of that lame song that is played when Sandalphon "hatches" and starts attacking Asuka?

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Sun Oct 24, 2004 1:42 pm Alright, what's the song that is played when everybody is at school in the alternate reality scene in episode 26? It's also played when Asuka is complaining to Misato about not being able to go on the school trip in episode 10, I *think*. And what about the song that is played when there is a major power blackout all over Japan in episode 6?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 24, 2004 10:23 pm Gilgamesh wrote: Alright, what's the song that is played when everybody is at school in the alternate reality scene in episode 26? It's also played when Asuka is complaining to Misato about not being able to go on the school trip in episode 10, I *think*. And what about the song that is played when there is a major power blackout all over Japan in episode 6?

[]:             Quote Post by Reverse Element » Sat Oct 30, 2004 4:53 am This is my first post on the board. I finally got around to registering on these forums after about a week of lurking about. Anyways, not to get too off topic, does anyone know the title of the song that plays during Rei's poem-type thing? It's also in one of the two final episodes. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Oct 30, 2004 7:51 am Reverse Element wrote: This is my first post on the board. I finally got around to registering on these forums after about a week of lurking about. Anyways, not to get too off topic, does anyone know the title of the song that plays during Rei's poem-type thing? It's also in one of the two final episodes. Thanks.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Oct 31, 2004 9:08 pm I wonder why anyone would want to know the name of a "lame" song?...

[]:             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Sun Oct 31, 2004 11:27 pm Hexon.Arq wrote: I wonder why anyone would want to know the name of a "lame" song?...

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Mon Nov 01, 2004 4:07 am Hey, I've just went to watch End of Evangelion, again, and I've just got to know the name of that song... That soft piano piece at the end of End of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Mon Nov 01, 2004 5:49 am MAGI wrote: Hey, I've just went to watch End of Evangelion, again, and I've just got to know the name of that song... That soft piano piece at the end of End of Evangelion?

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Mon Nov 01, 2004 6:04 am Wait, wasn't that during the live-action sequence? I'm talking about the very end, the last piece before the credits. When Shinji leaves his mother?

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Mon Nov 01, 2004 7:54 am MAGI wrote: Wait, wasn't that during the live-action sequence? I'm talking about the very end, the last piece before the credits. When Shinji leaves his mother?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 01, 2004 1:23 pm houtaru wrote: Oh, ok. Thats called "Opening of Dream".

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI » Mon Nov 01, 2004 7:02 pm Alright! It's all good. :P

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 02, 2004 2:39 pm What is the song thats playing while the Mega Rei is falling apart?? What album/CD is it on? Oh ya and whos the artist?

[]:             Quote Post by Ayanami » Tue Nov 02, 2004 5:21 pm Maybe you should just make a big list of all the songs you want to know the name of, and then post. (I'm being totally serious) But anyway, are you talking about the english song that's being played, or the instrumental piece? Because the english song is called "Komm Susser Tod" by some woman named Ariane, I think.

[]:             Quote Post by Dark FireStar » Tue Nov 02, 2004 5:41 pm oh okay thank ya :mrgreen:

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Nov 02, 2004 6:25 pm komm susser tod (some sweet death) was played during the mega-rei sequence and when the MP evas killed themselves...and lasted till the part when Shinji starts his self introspection...
summary:
[]: Need to Know the Names of These Songs             Quote Post by Gilgamesh » Sat Oct 23, 2004 6:44 pm Can anyone tell me the name of that lame song that is played when Sandalphon "hatches" and starts attacking Asuka? Also I would like to know the name of the song that is played in episode six when Shinji opens the super-heated hatch of Rei's entry plug.

[]:             Quot
